text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! Thank you for coming!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Greetings! This is the Umamusume Archive, where
records of your trainees' careers are stored.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
All the days you spend getting to know each
other, the days you spend training...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
The more memories you make, the higher your
Archive level will become.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Raising this level comes with its own rewards, so
you'd do well to work your hardest!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
As the overseer of the Archive, please let me
know if there's anything you need.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Correct! All the rewards have been entrusted to
Tazuna, so you'll be collecting them from her.
That's all from me!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, please work hard to make plenty of
wonderful memories. ♪

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I'll also be waiting with great anticipation to see
the amazing Archive you make. Ha-ha-ha!
